sglang.title: turn off log for the offline engine
sglang.author: zhaochenyang20
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Modifications

    def __init__(self, *args, **kwargs):

        # before python program terminates, call shutdown implicitly. Therefore, users don't have to explicitly call .shutdown()
        atexit.register(self.shutdown)
        
        # runtime server default log level is log

sglang.title: Do not use longest prefix matching when #queue-req is large
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: when #queue-req is large, the sorting and prefix matching can be expensive, so we disable it

sglang.title: Allow passing dtype and max_new_tokens to HF reference script
sglang.author: janimo
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Make this script a bit more flexible.

sglang.title: Simplify tokenizer manager
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Simplify the logic for batching and prefix caching of parallel sampling
Temporarily turn off reward model. Will fix it in the next pr.

sglang.title: Unify the model type checking
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Move all model type checks such as is_generation_model, is_multimodal_model, is_encoder_decoder_model into a single place under python/sglang/srt/configs/model_config.py

sglang.title: Escape backwards slash
sglang.author: inakineitor
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Attempting to import sglang caused a syntax error.
>>> import sglang
/root/sglang/python/sglang/utils.py:304: SyntaxWarning: invalid escape sequence '\ '
Modifications
Escaped the backwards slash with another backwards slash.
Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide

sglang.title: feat: support truss endpoint for benchmark serving
sglang.author: zhyncs
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

cc @pankajroark @bdubayah
python sglang.bench_serving --backend truss --model meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct --request-rate 46

# or
wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sgl-project/sglang/refs/heads/main/python/sglang/bench_serving.py
python bench_serving.py --backend truss --model

sglang.title: Let reward model take text inputs instead of message lists
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Make the /judge api accept text or token ids without chat template. This is to make it more similar to our existing endpoints such as /encode and /generate. Users can apply the chat templates by themselves.

sglang.title: Add Reward API Docs etc
sglang.author: zhaochenyang20
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

I fixed the CI of docs deploy, keep the original readme.md.
I added the docs for reward model server.
I added skywork in our unit test for reward model.
I changed our main readme to include reward model and give users a quick start.
I changed quick start accordingly.

Modifications

Chec

vllm.title: [Bugfix]Using the correct type hints
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Using the correct type hints. This is important when using cython to compile python code, it would crash at runtime when incorrect types are used.
